environment_contract.ld_library_contract: env lib + Isaac CUDA runtime libs + Isaac GPU deps + torch lib

independent_visual_review.interpretation: The three new review-only cameras pass their intended purpose. The overall WARN is only because canonical camera2 is not product-friendly; camera2 remains unchanged because it is the scoring/readback camera.

tabletop_camera.visible_evidence: Clear overhead tabletop layout: robot arm on left, blue/white box on right, table boundary visible.
tabletop_camera.main_risk: Door/handle details are not visible, but that is acceptable for a layout camera.

front_camera.visible_evidence: Strong front/three-quarter close view of the drying box; control panel, yellow button, blue door, window, and handle are clearly visible.
front_camera.main_risk: Tight crop excludes robot and clips some box context.

side_camera.visible_evidence: Robot arm, gripper, box, and approach spacing are visible from the side.
side_camera.main_risk: Robot is partially cropped at left, but task-relevant relation remains clear.

camera2.visible_evidence: Scene content is present: robot and box are visible.
camera2.main_risk: Large gray plane dominates; target is small and awkwardly angled.

allowed_claims: level1_open_door now has a review-only tabletop/front/side camera lane for reset-state inspection
tabletop_camera, front_camera, and side_camera reset PNGs are visually accepted for product review
camera2 remains the canonical scoring/readback camera and was not changed by the review lane
blocked_claims: full replay review videos are complete
pm_summary_cn: 这次补的不是新的评分相机，而是给产品和工程复盘看的三路 review camera：俯视图看桌面布局，正面图看门、把手和面板，侧面图看机械臂与箱子的相对位置。三张新图已经通过独立视觉审阅。原来的 camera2 仍保留为评分/readback 相机，所以画面不够好看不是缺陷回归，也不会改动 EBench 分数口径。下一步要在 full replay 里导出同样三路视频，才可以说任务过程视频证据闭环。
next_steps: Run full replay with the same review camera override after reset framing acceptance.
Export tabletop/front/side/camera2 MP4s and run visual review on the videos.
Keep canonical S2-R1E score/readback evidence as the only score source of truth.
